success.emailSent: A confirmation email has been sent to your email address.

newsletter.subtitle: Subscribe to get exclusive offers, new arrivals, and style tips.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.
contact.success: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.error: An error occurred while sending your message. Please try again.

delivery.a: Delivery within Dubai and Abu Dhabi takes 1-2 business days, other emirates take 2-3 business days.

returns.a: Yes, you can return the product within 14 days of receipt, provided it's in its original condition.

payment.a: We accept online payments (Stripe) and cash on delivery.

tracking.q: How can I track my order?
tracking.a: After your order is shipped, you'll receive an SMS with a tracking link.

areas.title: Shipping Areas
areas.description: We ship to all areas within the United Arab Emirates. For international orders, please contact customer service.

costs.title: Shipping Costs
costs.free: Free shipping on orders over 500 AED

tracking.title: Order Tracking
tracking.description: Once your order is shipped, you will receive an SMS or email with a tracking number. You can use this number to track your order.

cod.title: Cash on Delivery
cod.description: We accept cash on delivery for all orders within the UAE. Please have the exact amount ready when the courier arrives.

notes.title: Important Notes
notes.address: Please ensure your shipping address and phone number are correct
notes.delays: Shipments may be delayed during holidays and peak seasons
notes.contact: You will be contacted before delivery

contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.description: If you have any questions about shipping, please contact us through our contact page.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.description: We value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.

use.title: How We Use Your Information
use.communicate: Communicate with you about your orders

protection.title: Data Protection
protection.description: We use advanced security measures to protect your personal data from unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.description: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience. You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings.

contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.description: If you have any questions about our privacy policy, please contact us through our contact page.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.description: By using our website and services, you agree to be bound by these terms and conditions. Please read them carefully before using the site.

use.title: Use of Website
use.description: You must be 18 years or older to use this website. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and providing accurate information.

account.title: Account Responsibilities
account.description: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities under your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.

purchase.title: Orders and Purchases
purchase.description: All prices are in UAE Dirhams and subject to change. We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order. Product availability is subject to stock.

intellectual.title: Intellectual Property
intellectual.description: All content on this website, including text, images, logos, and designs, is our property and protected by copyright laws.

termination.title: Termination
termination.description: We may terminate or suspend your access to our website immediately, without prior notice, if you breach these terms. Upon termination, your right to use the website will immediately cease.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.description: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be posted on this page and your continued use of the website constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.

usage.title: Use of Website
usage.age: You must be 18 years or older to use this website
usage.account: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account
usage.accurate: You must provide accurate and complete information

orders.title: Orders and Purchases
orders.prices: All prices are in UAE Dirhams and subject to change
orders.refuse: We reserve the right to refuse or cancel any order
orders.stock: Product availability is subject to stock

ip.title: Intellectual Property
ip.description: All content on this website, including text, images, logos, and designs, is our property and protected by copyright laws.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.description: We shall not be liable for any direct or indirect damages arising from the use of our website or products, except as required by law.

prohibited.title: Prohibited Conduct
prohibited.illegal: Using the website for illegal purposes
prohibited.unauthorized: Attempting unauthorized access to our systems

modifications.title: Modifications
modifications.description: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be posted on this page and your continued use of the website constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.

law.title: Governing Law
law.description: These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the United Arab Emirates.

contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.description: If you have any questions about our terms of service, please contact us through our contact page.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: We strive to ensure your complete satisfaction with your purchases. If you are not satisfied, we offer refund options according to the following terms.

eligibility.title: Refund Eligibility
eligibility.time: Refund must be requested within 14 days of receipt
eligibility.condition: Products must be in original condition
eligibility.proof: Proof of purchase must be included

process.title: Refund Process
process.submit: Submit refund request through customer service

timeline.title: Refund Timeline
timeline.description: Once the refund request is approved and the returned product is received, the refund will be processed within 5-10 business days. It may take additional time for the amount to appear in your account depending on your bank.

exceptions.title: Exceptions
exceptions.description: Some products are non-refundable, including final sale items and customized products. Please review our return policy for full details.

contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.description: If you have any questions about our refund policy, please contact us through our contact page.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. If you are not satisfied with a product, you may return it according to the terms outlined below.

period.title: Return Period
period.description: You may return products within 14 days of receipt. Products must be in their original condition with all tags and packaging intact.

conditions.title: Return Conditions
conditions.unused: Products must be unused and in original condition
conditions.tags: All tags and labels must be attached
conditions.receipt: Original purchase receipt must be included
conditions.packaging: Products must be returned in original packaging

howTo.title: How to Return
howTo.contact: Contact customer service to request a return
howTo.ship: Ship the product to the designated address

contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.description: If you have any questions about our return policy, please contact us through our contact page.

story.title: Our Story
story.subtitle: Crafting Elegance Since 1990
story.content: Inspired by the beauty of cosmos, stars and the mysteries of outer space. We believe that just like stars, every individual shines with their own unique light. With FRANKLINIA explore the unknown, embrace the extraordinary and shine beyond.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.qualityDesc: We source the finest materials and employ master artisans to ensure every piece meets the highest standards.
philosophy.craftsmanshipDesc: Each design is a labor of love, combining age-old techniques with modern innovation.
philosophy.innovationDesc: We continuously push boundaries in design, creating unique geometric patterns that define modern luxury.
